original_image_tags: A single page with a dark green or black background, likely a photograph of a physical document or chalkboard. At the top is a hand-drawn sketch of a disc-shaped or lenticular object, resembling a classic "flying saucer" with a central dome or raised section. The sketch is rendered in a light-colored line (possibly white or light grey chalk/ink). Below the sketch are handwritten notes in the same light-colored medium.

elements.description: One hand-drawn sketch of a disc-shaped object with a raised central dome and a small rectangular window detail. Below the sketch is handwritten text that reads: 'Light - Kept FADING - Light sort of a white phosphorous color, - Bright around the outer rim.' Faint vertical lines are visible above the sketch.
